chatbot_setup.title: Chatbot Setup
chatbot_setup.subtitle: All chatbot configuration in one place

chatbot_config.title: Chatbot Configuration
chatbot_config.subtitle: Configure how your AI assistant behaves and responds to guests

model.verify_tooltip: Verify the chosen model is enabled on your API key
model.temperature_help: Controls creativity. Lower = more factual, higher = more creative. 0.7 is recommended for hospitality.
model.max_tokens_help: Maximum length of AI response. 1024 allows ~750 words — good for detailed hotel info. Increase for very long answers.
model.verbosity_help: Controls how concise vs detailed responses are, separately from token budget. Use low for chatbot-style brevity; medium is the doc default; high for thorough explanations.
model.verbosity_low: Low — concise, punchy replies (recommended for chat)
model.reasoning_help: Controls how much GPT-5.x 'thinks' before answering. Higher effort = slower but deeper. For a fast sales chatbot, 'low' is ideal. Temperature is ignored unless set to 'none'.
model.reasoning_none: None — temperature active, fastest (like classic GPT)
model.reasoning_low: Low — light reasoning, fast responses ★ recommended for chat
model.reasoning_xhigh: xHigh — maximum reasoning, slowest (for complex analysis)
model.reasoning_warning: Temperature and top_p are ignored when reasoning effort is active (none disables it).
model.luxury_hint: For luxury hospitality: temperature 0.7, tokens 1024–2048. Higher tokens for room descriptions & detailed policy explanations.
model.reasoning_temp_hint: Reasoning models ignore temperature unless effort = none.
